user.title: Smart Lawn Watering
user.description: Select the weather entity, the sensors and the two sprinkler switches. Only weather, temperature and the two switches are required; the rest is optional and improves the plan.

data_description.rain_now_sensor: Used to pause watering during rain. Leave empty to disable rain interruption.
data_description.rain_data_sensor: High-resolution rain nowcast (e.g. sensor.neerslag_buienalarm_regen_data). Used to look ahead and refine the plan; the plan is recalculated several times a day.
data_description.calc_time: Time at which the day plan is calculated each day (extra recalculations run at 07:00, 11:00, 13:30 and 16:00).

init.title: Smart Lawn Watering settings
init.description: Change the chosen entities and the daily calculation time. Clear an optional field to stop using that sensor.

calculate_plan.name: Calculate plan
calculate_plan.description: Calculate a new day plan based on the weather and settings. Optional test fields override the real measurements without watering.

test_regen_24u.name: Test rain last 24h
test_regen_24u.description: Override the rain of the last 24 hours.

run_cycle.name: Run watering cycle
run_cycle.description: Run a watering cycle with all safety checks.

big_minutes.name: Big sprinkler minutes
big_minutes.description: Run time for the big sprinkler.

small_minutes.name: Small sprinkler minutes
small_minutes.description: Run time for the small sprinkler.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Free text logged with the cycle.

slot.name: Label
slot.description: Label shown in notifications and logs.

force_test.name: Force test mode
force_test.description: Treat this run as a dry-run.

start_big.name: Start big sprinkler
start_big.description: Start the big sprinkler for a number of minutes.

start_small.name: Start small sprinkler
start_small.description: Start the small sprinkler for a number of minutes.

stop_all.name: Stop all sprinklers
stop_all.description: Turn off both sprinklers and cancel a running cycle.

test_scenario.name: Run test scenario
test_scenario.description: Calculate a day plan for a simulated weather scenario in test mode (no real watering).
